title: mitrasacme nummularia
intro: Mitrasacme nummularia is a species of flowering plant in the family Mitrasacme, commonly known as the coin-flower or coin purse, due to its coin-like flowers. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mitrasacme nummularia include its ability to treat various skin conditions, such as acne, eczema, and wounds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Mitrasacme nummularia are often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are used to support overall health and well-being.
